title: Beyond the Middle East and Yields: How the Wealth Management Industry navigates turmoil
section_path: Beyond the Middle East and Yields: How the Wealth Management Industry navigates turmoil
section_path_text: Beyond the Middle East and Yields: How the Wealth Management Industry navigates turmoil
summary:
Main
By George Lagarias
Since September, there have been two issues dominating markets: high yields and geopolitics. In the past few weeks, both have been exhausted. As far as the Middle East is concerned, we acknowledge that all outcomes are possible at this stage, from further escalation to de-escalation.
